ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Current GDP of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., Inflation Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., %) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator being tracked */,
  "last_value" REAL /* Most recent value of the indicator */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value of the indicator */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Date of the most recent data reference */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the period information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of indicator */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
